          about

          Bydd yr holl elw o'r albwm hwn yn mynd i Ganolfan Lôn Abaty ym Mangor sy'n cefnogi gwell iechyd meddwl i bobl dros 18 oed yng Ngwynedd, Conwy ac Ynys Môn.

          All proceeds from this album will go to the Abbey Road Centre in Bangor which supports better mental health for people over 18 in Gwynedd, Conwy and Ynys Môn.

          Am mwy o wybodaith / For more information:

          www.abbeyroadcentre.co.uk

          credits

          released December 2, 2021

          license

          all rights reserved

          Tags

          alternative Bangor

          subtotal USD

          Check out

          about

          COMRADIATION Bangor, UK

          "Comradiation" yw platfform cerddorol Cymrodyr Bangor. mae POB elw yn elwa tuag at achosion lleol a enwir.

          "Comradiation" is the musical platform of the Bangor Comrades, ALL profit towards named local causes.

          discography

          • Aye of the Bangor
            Dec 2023
          • Lôn Abaty / Abbey Road
            Dec 2021

          If you like COMRADIATION, you may also like:

          • Breaking Point
            by JUMP

            supported by 9 fans who also own “Lôn Abaty / Abbey Road”

            ...a bit more mellow music compared to what I normally listen to. Anyway great songs. Kudos to JUMP for giving a voice to the vulnerables and the refugees ! SimonM

            go to album

            by JUMP

            supported by 8 fans who also own “Lôn Abaty / Abbey Road”

            Just a bloody great album Mark Colton

          • Looking for affection
